purpose: Design system bilesen kalitesini sistematik olarak yukseltmek: 16 D/F bileseni düzeltmek, a11y compliance gate'i aktif etmek, CI otomasyon saglamak

milestones.title: Test Depth Sprint — 16 kritik bilesen

completion_evidence.scorecard: apps/mfe-shell/public/scorecard.json — F=0, D=0, C=18, B=37, A=163 (218 component)
completion_evidence.shell_header: B (54) — F (12) baseline'dan +42 puan; testDepth 53, a11y 95 (PR #36)
completion_evidence.residual_note: Grade objective completed. Behavior-depth residual (~50 shallow, ~38 a11y=0) M2/M4 quality-hardening backlog'unda takip ediliyor.

dod: Her bilesen icin: userEvent test, assertion density >= 3/test

milestones.title: A11y Compliance Gate — CI zorunlu
dod: a11y-gate.mjs discovery scorecard component evreniyle uyumlu (.figma.tsx, .stories.tsx, .test.tsx, .visual.tsx, .browser.tsx, index.tsx, types.tsx haric)
CI gate: a11y test coverage < %70 altinda PR bloklaniyor (a11y-gate.mjs THRESHOLD=0.7)
Lokal/CI verify: en az %70 coverage PASS

in_progress_evidence.remaining: PR merge sonrası enforcement aktif; 58 component a11y test eksik (Top 10: CommandPaletteTrigger, Container, Flex, FullscreenToggle, HeaderBar, HoverDescription, Image, Progress, Statistic, StatusIndicator)

milestones.title: Scorecard CI Otomasyonu

completion_evidence.workflow: .github/workflows/scorecard-gate.yml — PR'da packages/design-system/src/** veya scripts/ci/** path-filter ile tetiklenir (PR #35)
completion_evidence.pr_comment: Component scorecard skoru artifact + PR comment via actions/github-script@v7
completion_evidence.verified_run: PR #36 (ShellHeader F→B) — 30s PASS, scorecard-gate ilk gercek tetikleme
completion_evidence.f_grade_block: F-grade icin merge bloklar (D'ler M5 escalation'a kadar warn)

dod: GitHub Actions workflow: her PR'da scorecard calisir
PR'a otomatik yorum: grade dagilimi + degisen bilesenlerin skorlari

milestones.title: Story Coverage %95
dod: Her story: en az 2 variant (default + edge case)

milestones.title: Quality Gate Escalation — Block Mode
dod: D notu altindaki bilesen PR merge edilemiyor
Yeni bilesen ekleme sablonu C+ minimum ile basliyor
milestones.effort_estimate: 1 gun (M2 sonrasi; M1 ve M3 2026-04-28 itibariyle tamamlandi)
